ModMetadata.Name: Satellite Pad Index
ModMetadata.Author: Vespinian
ModMetadata.Description:
This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
This mod makes the TargetPadIndex logic type of the satellites look up the reference id of a Landingpad Data and Power Structure to make Landing pad selection easier.
If the value in the TargetPadIndex in less or equal to 10, the vanilla behavior is used.
If not. The code checks all connected pads. For each pad, it checks the landing pad's network connected structures for a Landingpad Data and Power Structure. If it finds one, it sets the target pad to that pad and returns.
Repo: https://github.com/Vespinian/stationeers-pad-index
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
<size="30"><color=#ffa500> Satellite Pad Index </color></size> This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
This mod makes the TargetPadIndex logic type of the satellites look up the reference id of a Landingpad Data and Power Structure to make Landing pad selection easier.
If the value in the TargetPadIndex in less or equal to 10, the vanilla behavior is used.
If not. The code checks all connected pads. For each pad, it checks the landing pad's network connected structures for a Landingpad Data and Power Structure. If it finds one, it sets the target pad to that pad and returns.
Repo: https://github.com/Vespinian/stationeers-pad-index
